title: Falcon - Unpair Headset from Charge Stand
feature: Falcon - Unpair Headset from Charge Stand
scenario: Unpair a headset from a Charge Stand and verify no Charge Stand info appears in Software Update.
steps: Go to Device Settings > Reset Device and tap "Clear" next to "Clear Trusted Device List" to disconnect the headset from the app.
Remove the headset from the app and phone's Bluetooth settings, then re-pair it.
Go to Device Settings > Software Update and verify no Charge Stand info is shown.
expected: No Charge Stand info is shown in Software Update.
